title: nasa tingomariensis
side_effects: Nasa tingomariensis can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, skin irritation, and increased sensitivity to sunlight, which can lead to severe burns and blisters. Ingesting the plant's extracts can cause gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and stomach cramps. Excessive use of Nasa tingomariensis can also lead to an imbalance of electrolytes in the body, resulting in muscle weakness, dizziness, and cardiovascular problems. Furthermore, it may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners, and exacerbate underlying medical conditions.
